reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SMS Gammu Gateway
reauth_confirm.description: The gateway at {host} rejected the stored credentials. Enter the current username and password.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check IP and Port.

send_sms.name: Send SMS
send_sms.description: Send an SMS message through the Gammu gateway.

number.name: Number
number.description: Recipient phone number (comma-separate for multiple recipients).

message.name: Message
message.description: Text of the message to send.

smsc.name: SMSC
smsc.description: Optional SMS center number. Leave empty to use the SIM default.

entry_id.name: Gateway
entry_id.description: Gateway to use (only needed with multiple gateways).

clear_messages.name: Clear messages
clear_messages.description: Remove every message from the stored SMS history in Home Assistant.

entry_id.name: Gateway
entry_id.description: Gateway to use (only needed with multiple gateways).

delete_message.name: Delete message
delete_message.description: Remove a single message from the stored SMS history in Home Assistant.

message_id.name: Message id
message_id.description: The id of the message to remove (from the SMS Messages sensor attributes).

entry_id.name: Gateway
entry_id.description: Gateway to use (only needed with multiple gateways).
